Car Loan Payment Calculator

Calculate your monthly car loan payment. Enter the vehicle price, down payment, interest rate, and loan term.

FAQ

How is a car loan payment calculated?

Car loan payments use the same amortization formula as mortgages: M = P[r(1+r)^n]/[(1+r)^n-1], where P is the loan amount after down payment.

What is a good car loan interest rate?

As of 2024, good rates range from 4-7% for new cars and 5-10% for used cars, depending on credit score.

How long should a car loan be?

Most experts recommend 36-60 months. Longer terms mean lower payments but more total interest paid.
